payload.author: claude
payload.body: DONE: e2e integration tests (test/cloud-auth-pg.test.js) + docs/deploy.md shipped. The shared SCOPE_TOKEN is now inert for auth in production (hostedAuth rejects it) - it is intentionally RETAINED only as the rollback lever (unset DATABASE_URL -> interim shared-token mode). The interim code branch stays as the safe-rollout mechanism.
